source_reviews.notes: The official 2022 manual directly defines 621610 as skilled nursing in the home with related services, lists in-home hospice, and cross-references primarily non-medical home care to 624120.
CMS directly reports the 30-day PDGM framework, -1.023% permanent adjustment, -3.0% temporary adjustment, and estimated 1.3% aggregate payment decline.
MedPAC directly supports the beneficiary, spending, agency-supply, access, 21.2% 2024 margin, 19% 2026 projection, and 7% 2027 cut recommendation used in the record.
The vendor page reports an independent survey of more than 400 home-care leaders and the cited 91% using-or-planning statistic; the packet retains the sponsor and use-versus-plan limitations.

The Alliance directly documents demand, home-setting differences, privacy and consent concerns, cost, workforce-readiness, integration, interoperability, and legal barriers, but its constituency spans home health, hospice, HCBS, and non-medical home care rather than exact 621610 alone.

The survey directly reports more than 200 home-health clinicians, 50% personal-or-professional AI use, and 70% interest in ambient documentation; the packet does not misstate these as representative production penetration.

The report supports 105 2025 home-based-care transactions, three Q4 home-health add-ons, VitalCaring, Addus, and Amivie activity. Addus and the cited Amivie deals sit partly or wholly in broader home care, which the authored active-consolidator caveat expressly discloses.

The advisory page directly gives 3.5x-7.0x for Medicare-certified home health and 6.0x-10.0x-plus for multi-service platforms. The selected estimates remain within those ranges and retain segment and deal-tape caveats.

The Census page provides broad employer-business owner-age tables, but not a 621610-specific 60-plus share or the selected 0.22 estimate; the record labels the input LOW-quality ESTIMATE and preserves that exact proxy caveat.

publication_caveats: inputs.ai_replaceable_share: RN documentation savings may raise capacity or retention rather than remove positions.
inputs.ai_replaceable_share: The 17.66% residual combines schedulers, coders, recruiters and marketers with very different automation exposure.
inputs.pi_dist: Strong Medicare evidence does not directly quantify Medicaid, MA or private-pay pass-through; the selected value represents the skilled-home-health base case.
inputs.pi_moat: Certificate-of-need and licensure barriers vary by state, and personal-care operations outside exact 621610 may have lower entry barriers.
inputs.t50_years: Surveys do not report a representative six-digit, workflow-weighted effective-adoption measure.
inputs.current_adoption_pct: AxisCare combines current use with plans, WellSky includes personal use, and both are vendor-sponsored.
inputs.historical_analogs: Mandated EVV and payment-model changes are imperfect analogs for voluntary AI investment.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct: Broad employer-business proxy, not 621610-specific and not necessarily weighted by control ownership.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct.succession_shortage_documented: Active M&A and aging portfolio companies do not by themselves prove an owner succession shortage.
inputs.active_consolidators: Addus and Amivie examples include home care, which may fall outside exact 621610 when primarily non-medical; the count is a conservative home-based-care buyer floor.
inputs.buy_mult: Advisory benchmark, not a complete closed-deal tape; quality scores, CON status, payer mix, compliance and earnouts can move price materially.
inputs.exit_mult: The platform range can include broader service lines; hospice multiples are excluded from the base case, and CMS rate risk can compress exit pricing.
inputs.pricing_structure: The payer mix of the supplied EBITDA-band firms is not reported, and exact 621610 excludes establishments primarily providing non-medical home care.
summary: Mechanics, identity, dataset injection, fresh finalization, memo rendering, digests, and arithmetic all pass. Reopened sources support the durable-demand, limited administrative-AI surface, payer-clawback, and valuation-direction thesis. Broad home-based-care evidence, adoption surveys, owner-age data, buyer examples, and platform multiples require the packet's retained scope and proxy caveats, but no defect is likely to reverse a factor or the kill conclusion.
